en.extract:
The Makira fantail  or dusky fantail (Rhipidura tenebrosa) is a species of bird in the family Rhipiduridae.
It is endemic to the Solomon Islands.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.
It is threatened by habitat loss.


Taxonomy
Makira fantail (R. tenebrosa) forms a superspecies with: 

Brown fantail (R. drownei)
Rennell fantail (R. rennelliana)
Streaked fantail (R. verreauxi)
Kadavu fantail (R. personata)
Samoan fantail (R. nebulosa)


References

The '''Makira fantail'''  or '''dusky fantail''' ('''''Rhipidura tenebrosa''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Rhipiduridae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the [[Solomon Islands]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.
It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].

== Taxonomy ==

Makira fantail (''R. tenebrosa'') forms a [[superspecies]] with:<ref name="ngb">{{cite web |author  = Tvardikova K. |url = https://pngbirds.myspecies.info/content/rhipidura-drownei  |title = ''Rhipidura drownei'' Gould, 1843 |lang = en |website = New Guinea Birds online |publisher   = |date =2022|access-date  = 2022-02-24|ref=New Guinea Birds online}}</ref> 
* [[Brown fantail]] (''R. drownei'')
* [[Rennell fantail]] (''R. rennelliana'')
* [[Streaked fantail]] (''R. verreauxi'')
* [[Kadavu fantail]] (''R. personata'')
* [[Samoan fantail]] (''R. nebulosa'')
